_comment: Edit this file to change your workout plan. Reload the app after saving.
_reps: For timed holds (e.g. L-sit), reps = seconds

exercises.name: Australian Row
exercises.note: Lie under paralettes, pull chest to bar. Feet flat. Full scapular retraction.
exercises.why: Loads ~30–42 kg bodyweight vs 12.5 kg DB. Your best back exercise.

exercises.name: Chest-Supported DB Row
exercises.note: 3s eccentric. Chest on bench — isolates mid-back.

exercises.name: DB Pullover
exercises.note: Head fully on bench, neck relaxed. Deep lat stretch at top.

exercises.name: Reverse DB Fly
exercises.note: 2s hold at top, strict. Rear delts are small — 5 kg is correct.

exercises.name: Hammer Curls
exercises.note: Neutral grip, controlled. Brachialis focus.

exercises.name: Concentration Curl
exercises.note: Elbow on inner thigh, pause at full stretch at bottom.

exercises.name: DB Romanian Deadlift
exercises.note: Hinge at hips, soft knees. Feel hamstring stretch, not lower back.

exercises.name: Bulgarian Split Squat
exercises.note: DB in each hand, rear foot on bench. Deep lunge, full depth.
exercises.why: Better than goblet squat — unilateral, deeper stretch, more hypertrophy stimulus.

exercises.name: Calf Raise
exercises.note: One DB in hand, other hand on paralette for balance. Full stretch at bottom, pause at top.

exercises.name: Dips (chest focus)
exercises.note: Lean forward ~20°, elbows slightly flared. Lower until upper arm parallel.
exercises.why: Replaces floor press + skull crushers. Hits lower chest, anterior delt, all 3 tricep heads.

exercises.name: Deficit Push-ups (paralettes)
exercises.note: Hands on paralettes. Lean forward for chest, upright for triceps. Deep ROM.

exercises.name: Overhead DB Press
exercises.note: Seated or standing. Full lockout at top, core braced.

exercises.name: Lateral Raises
exercises.note: Slight forward lean. Pinky slightly higher at top. Last set near failure.

exercises.name: Standing DB Tricep Extension
exercises.note: Both hands on one DB overhead. Full stretch — long head emphasis.

exercises.name: Dips (tricep focus)
exercises.note: Stay upright, elbows close. Full lockout at top. Tricep emphasis.
exercises.why: Chest/triceps first while fresh — biceps after. Better output on both.

exercises.name: Decline Push-ups (feet on paralettes)
exercises.note: Feet elevated on paralettes. Upper chest angle your other exercises don't cover.

exercises.name: Chest Fly
exercises.note: On floor or bench. Controlled stretch at bottom. Isolation finisher.

exercises.name: Heavy DB Curls
exercises.note: Strict — no swing. Strength stimulus. Your hardest curl set of the week.

exercises.name: Slow Eccentric Curls
exercises.note: 4s negative. Intentionally lighter than above — different hypertrophy stimulus.

exercises.name: Bent-Over DB Row (one arm)
exercises.note: 2s squeeze at top. Hits lower lats differently to Australian Row.

exercises.name: DB Pullover
exercises.note: Slow, deep. Second lat stretch session of the week.

exercises.name: Lateral Raises
exercises.note: Pump, not failure. Second lateral delt session.

exercises.name: Reverse DB Fly
exercises.note: Rear delt + rotator cuff health. Keep weight light and strict.

exercises.name: Front Raises
exercises.note: Controlled, no swing. Raise to shoulder height only. Anterior delt isolation.

exercises.name: L-Sit Hold
exercises.note: Tuck knees first, extend legs when you can hold 20s tuck. Reps = seconds held.
exercises.why: Only direct core work in the plan. Tuck → L-sit → V-sit is a year+ progression.

exercises.name: Wrist Curl (palm up)
exercises.note: Forearm on thigh. Wrist movement only — forearm flexors.

exercises.name: Reverse Wrist Curl (palm down)
exercises.note: Extensors much weaker — never match wrist curl weight. Elbow strain risk.
